## Track 3 Case A (KDS wiring) — Read-only verification (2026-06-09)

**Location:** committed on `agent/nex-case-022-track-4` (`3908da0`). Subsumes **nex022-P1-01**. Verified under [[nex-case-024-kds-workflow]].

### Verified claims

| Claim | Verdict |
|-------|---------|
| Workflow simplify — two-hop `IN_PROGRESS→READY→SERVED` in `advance()` | ✅ `KdsController.php` L77–97 |
| Button labels `Start Preparing` / `Mark as Served` | ✅ `KdsTicketCard.vue` |
| `kdsApi.ts` CSRF + `route()` POST to advance/toggle | ✅ |
| `Display.vue` server-driven via `useKdsBoard` + `useKdsEcho` | ✅ + `pendingAdvance`/`pendingToggle` guards |
| `READY` → "Preparing" display normalization | ✅ seed, `normalizeKdsState`, payload |
| All 6 `broadcastAs` names match Echo listeners | ✅ public `Channel('admin.orders')` |
| Recall **action** removed (`applyRecall`, `@recall` gone) | ✅ passive "Recalled ×N" badge retained |

**Realtime chain:** click → `kds.advance` → locked transition → `OrderStatusUpdated` (`order.updated`) → all screens including acting screen (no `toOthers()`).

### Non-blocking findings (Case B / hygiene)

1. **Pest:** `nextStatus()` no longer single-hops `IN_PROGRESS→READY` — update any KdsController tests that asserted old path; add coverage for two-hop + items-done gate.
2. **Recall wording:** action removed; badge/types/CSS remain — dead `.kds-card-action.is-recall` in `Display.vue`; check `applyAdvance` export in `kdsHelpers.ts`.
3. **`admin.orders` is public** — `channels.php` private auth callback is dead config; payloads unauthenticated (pre-existing; Case A now depends on it).
4. **Broadcast-driven UI** — no optimistic update; if Echo down, advance persists but UI frozen until reload. **R1 two-screen sync at Pi is #1 runtime gate.**

Pending: `php artisan test` (expect KdsController assertion updates) → WSL **R1** at `https://192.168.100.7/kds`.

### KdsControllerTest — exact failures (confirmed 2026-06-09)

Run: `php artisan test tests/Feature/Admin/KdsControllerTest.php` → **3 failed, 7 passed**.

| Test | Line | Current assertion | Required for Case A |
|------|------|-------------------|---------------------|
| `mark ready is gated when items are not all done` | 28 | `…advancing to Ready.` | `…marking as served.` |
| `mark ready advances when all items are done` | 39–41 | JSON `ready`, DB `OrderStatus::READY` | JSON `served`, DB `OrderStatus::SERVED` |
| `mark ready gate re-checks items inside the transaction` | 124 | `…advancing to Ready.` | `…marking as served.` |

**Unchanged (7 pass):** confirmed→in_progress advance, toggle done/undone, non-admin 403, terminal-order toggle 422s.

**Optional:** rename test titles from "mark ready" → "mark served"; add test that READY single-hop via `nextStatus(READY→SERVED)` still works if that path is reachable outside the two-hop block.

2 — Full-stack static audit (admin UI + backend). No mutations; findings classified for follow-up.

## Problem

Operator requested a full-stack review of `woosoo-nexus`: all admin features/pages, backend logic, bugs, edge cases, and static quality gates — audit report only, no code edits.

## Success Criterion

Single evidence-backed audit report with static-gate output, classified findings (P1/P2/P3 + Woosoo tier), dead/orphan inventory, and runtime verification checklist. **Met.**

---

## Static Quality Gates (2026-06-09, Windows host)

| Gate | Command | Result |
|------|---------|--------|
| TypeScript | `npm run typecheck` | **PASS** |
| ESLint | `npm run lint:check` | **PASS** |
| Vite build | `npm run build` | **PASS** (~13s) |
| Vitest | `npm run test:unit` | **PASS** — 5/5 (`kdsHelpers.test.ts` only) |
| Pint | `vendor/bin/pint --test` | **FAIL** — style drift across ~300+ PHP files (not functional) |
| Pest | `composer test` | **PASS** — **463 tests**, 1664 assertions (~183s) |
| Route list | `php artisan route:list --json` | **PASS** — exported for cross-check |

> Platform `pre-merge-check.ps1 -App woosoo-nexus` runs PHP only (no frontend gates). CI `ci.yml` runs lint/typecheck/build + Pest; `lint.yml` runs Pint as **non-blocking** (`|| true`).

---

## Summary

| Severity | Count | Cursor-safe (Tier 1–2) | Claude Code only (Tier 3) |
|----------|------:|-------------------------:|--------------------------:|
| **P1** | 8 | 5 | 3 |
| **P2** | 14 | 12 | 2 |
| **P3** | 6 | 6 | 0 |
| **Total** | **28** | **23** | **5** |

**Headline:** Build and test suites are green, but several admin flows reference **missing or wrong routes**, and **KDS is not wired to live backend/Echo** despite full server implementation. Pint style gate fails broadly (hygiene, not runtime).

---

## P1 — Functionality / Broken Paths

| ID | Location | Issue | Tier | Fix owner |
|----|----------|-------|------|-----------|
| P1-01 | `resources/js/pages/KDS/Display.vue` | KDS runs **client-only** state (`advanceTicket`, `toggleItem` mutate local refs). Does **not** call `kds.advance` / `kds.toggle-item` APIs or import `useKdsEcho` / `useKdsBoard`. New orders never appear after page load; advances do not persist or broadcast. Backend `KdsController` is fully implemented. | **3** (order state + Reverb) | Claude Code |
| P1-02 | `IndexTabletCategories.vue` → `route('tablet-categories.reorder')` | **Route missing** in `routes/web.php`. Controller method `TabletCategoryController::reorder()` **exists** (lines 211–223) but never registered. Drag-reorder → 404. | **2** | Cursor |
| P1-03 | `IndexPackageConfigs.vue` → `route('package-configs.allowed-menus', pkg.id)` | **Route does not exist**. Closest backend action is `POST package-configs.sync-menus` (`PackageConfigController::syncAllowedMenus`). "Manage Menus" link → Ziggy/runtime error. | **2** | Cursor |
| P1-04 | `resources/js/components/Menus/DataTableRowActions.vue` → `route('Menus.destroy', …)` | Wrong route name/casing. Registered routes: `menus`, `menus.bulk-toggle-availability`, `menu.upload.image` — **no destroy**. Dead/commented UI still references it. | **2** | Cursor |
| P1-05 | `routes/web.php` L207 + `DeviceController` | `devices.trashed` registered → `DeviceController::trashed()` **does not exist** (direct URL → bad method / 500). Index page shows trashed devices inline via `withTrashed()`; dedicated trashed page unreachable. | **2** | Cursor |
| P1-06 | `routes/api.php` L101–104 | `GET /order/{orderId}/dispatch` calls `PrintOrder::dispatch($order)` when `$order` may be **null** (no guard). | **3** (print dispatch) | Claude Code |
| P1-07 | `routes/web.php` L237–277 `pos.fill-order` closure | On exception returns `$e->getMessage()` in JSON 500 — **raw technical error** to admin client. Bypasses controller layer; direct status mutation on `DeviceOrder`. | **3** (order state) | Claude Code |
| P1-08 | `UserController::show()` L132–135 | Empty stub (`//`). `Route::resource('/users')` exposes `GET /users/{user}` → blank response if visited. | **2** | Cursor |

### Ziggy cross-check (automated)

Vue `route('…')` names **missing** from `php artisan route:list`:

```
Menus.destroy
Menus.restore
package-configs.allowed-menus
register
tablet-categories.reorder
```

| P2-11 | Static analysis | No PHPStan/Larastan. Pint `--test` fails repo-wide. | 2 |
| P2-12 | `pre-merge-check` | Nexus gate = PHP only; frontend quality not enforced at platform merge. | 2 |
| P2-13 | Orphan API controllers | Present in codebase, **no routes**: `EventReplayController`, `Api/V1/PrintController`, `BranchApiController`, `TableApiController`, `MenuImageApiController`, `OrderUpdateLogController`, `ServiceMonitorController`, `Api/V1/Krypton/*`. | 2 |
| P2-14 | [[nex-case-020-admin-ui-audit-fixes]] follow-ups | Documented gaps still open: `devices.trashed` implementation, `allowed-menus` page, category reorder route. | 2 |

---

## Backend Review Notes (static trace)

### Order state machine — OK with guards
- `DeviceOrder::setStatusAttribute()` enforces `OrderStatus::canTransitionTo()` (throws on illegal transition).
- `KdsController::advance()` uses row locks, concurrent-state check, item-done gate before Ready.
- `DeviceOrderObserver` fans out broadcasts on status change.

### Tablet intake contract — OK
- `StoreDeviceOrderRequest::prepareForValidation()` strips non-intent fields; validates `guest_count`, `package_id`, `items[].menu_id/quantity` only.

### POS integration — partially hardened
- [[nex-case-021-pos-connection-hardening]] added `PosConnectionService::posStatus()` and disconnected POS banner on `/pos`.
- POS DB unreachable: graceful empty states in several controllers (`PackageConfigController`, `TabletCategoryController`, `DeviceController` table fetch).

### Print path — feature-flagged
- `PrintEventService` no-ops when `print_events_enabled` false (MVP = print-bridge).
- Idempotency covered in tests (`PrintTicketServiceTest`, `RefillIdempotencyTest`).

### Auth boundaries — generally sound
- Web admin: `auth` + `can:admin`.
- Tablet API: `auth:device` (Sanctum + Device model).
- Session admin API: `auth:sanctum` for reset/force-end.

---

## Admin UI Page Inventory (54 pages)

**Routed and functional (static review):** Auth (login, forgot/reset/confirm password, verify email), Dashboard, Orders, POS, Menus, Package Configs, Tablet Categories, Devices CRUD, Users CRUD, Service Requests, Reports hub (7 reports), Branches, Roles/Permissions, Accessibility matrix, Event Logs, Reverb, Monitoring, Configuration hub, POS Connection, Admin Settings, Manual, Media, Packages (legacy modifiers), KDS (loads initial tickets only), Settings (profile/password/appearance), 403 error page.

**Broken or orphan (see findings above):** Register, reports/sales/* subtree, KDS live sync, category drag-reorder, Manage Menus link, users.show stub, devices.trashed route.

## Tiered Remediation Backlog

### Batch A — Cursor-safe (Tier 2, frontend + route wiring)
1. Register `tablet-categories.reorder` → `TabletCategoryController::reorder`
2. Fix `package-configs.allowed-menus` (add page + route, or wire to sync-menus UI)
3. Remove or fix `Menus.destroy` / implement menu deactivate route
4. Implement `DeviceController::trashed()` or remove route
5. Implement `UserController::show()` or exclude from resource
6. Remove/archive orphan `Register.vue`, `reports/sales/*`
7. Add KDS link to sidebar (optional quick win before full KDS wire-up)

### Batch B — Claude Code (Tier 3)
1. Wire KDS `Display.vue` to `kds.advance`, `kds.toggle-item`, and `useKdsEcho`
2. Harden `GET /order/{id}/dispatch` null guard + auth review
3. Replace `pos.fill-order` closure with controller + friendly errors
4. Review `ProcessOrderLogs` / order_update_logs migration decision

### Batch C — Hygiene (non-blocking)
1. Run Pint on changed files only (avoid repo-wide reformat PR)
2. Add Vitest to nexus CI for changed Vue modules
3. Align CI workflows (`lint.yml` staging, typecheck blocking)
4. Extend `pre-merge-check` frontend gates for nexus
